introSection: Fighter Jet is a steel launched roller coaster at Glorious Orient in Rencheng, Jining, Shandong, China.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 8 riders per train.

fullText:
Fighter Jet is a steel launched roller coaster at Glorious Orient in Rencheng, Jining, Shandong, China.



2 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 8 riders per train.
